title: April 17th, 2022
body:
lyrics

what can i sample
why ain't it simple
for example
why can't i tell a snare from a cymbal
the form of my fingers
figures in every record i handle
so i drop my collection of thoughts
why
to chop and dismantle
make connections on the fly
so i can fly by connecting
but my question is
what can i build my nest with
thieving
a magpie since i was born under a bad sign
beat it as i get hit with the signs to ward off the evil eye
i talk literally
fitting sounds to space in the time this walk's given me
they call it speaking in tongues
clucking together, believe that it's one voice
when it's my choice i squawk lib'rally
leave when i'm done
don't drop the mic billy always need one
that's the bed that i lie in
made from links that i find in the places that i'm in
the kinks from the binding
that pinches my nerves even more when i'm trying
the world i'm inspiring
every word i serve expiring
every breath a slice of the space i fly in


titles

patterns of noise

patterns above noise (the root fascism)

patterns away from being of noise

patterns ain't noise

will to flow

presupposes existence

marked by movement

will to power (homogenous chains /single stories)

marked by confidence

i believe i can do this

overindexing fascism

offers access to movement in exchange for access to existence

will to wisdom (heterogeneous chains/ many stories)

marked by clarity

i see what i can do

i don't know but it's

more like ennui and dissolution than hot warful mayhem

offers access to existence in exchange access to movement
